nasb.text: “I will make her princes and her wise men drunk, Her governors, her prefects and her mighty men, That they may sleep a perpetual sleep and not wake up,” Declares the King, whose name is the Lord of hosts.

esv.text: I will make drunk her officials and her wise men, her governors, her commanders, and her warriors; they shall sleep a perpetual sleep and not wake, declares the King, whose name is the Lord of hosts.

cnv.text: 我必使巴比倫的領袖和智慧人， 省長、總監和勇士都喝醉， 永遠沉睡，不再醒來。” 這是君王的宣告， 萬軍之耶和華是他的名。

ccb.text: 我要使她的首领、谋士、省长、 总督和勇士都酩酊大醉， 长眠不醒。” 这是君王——万军之耶和华说的。
